description: Curated retrieval benchmark cases for core Magnus motifs and fear domains.

cases.title: Isolation in an empty flat
cases.query: an empty apartment and the fear of being completely alone
cases.notes: Should strongly surface Alone or the later Lonely benchmark The Last.

cases.title: Trapped underground in a cave
cases.query: getting trapped underground in a cave with no way back out
cases.notes: Lost Johns' Cave should be one of the clearest Buried retrievals.

cases.title: Haunted battlefield and trench music
cases.query: a haunted battlefield with strange piping in the trenches
cases.notes: The Piper should rank highly for war and battlefield horror.

cases.title: Endless falling through open sky
cases.query: falling forever through the open sky with nothing to hold onto
cases.notes: Freefall or the later Vast benchmark Precipice should validate Vast retrieval.

cases.title: Worms under the skin
cases.query: worms crawling under the skin and a body being infested from the inside
cases.notes: Either Squirm or Hive should hit very early.

cases.title: House full of spiders
cases.query: spiders crawling through a house and webs in every corner
cases.notes: Arachnophobia is the direct Web benchmark.

cases.title: Not-quite-human watcher across the street
cases.query: watching a not quite human figure across the street every day
cases.notes: Across The Street should validate Stranger retrieval.

cases.title: Impossible corridors and wrong doors
cases.query: impossible hallways and doors that lead somewhere wrong
cases.notes: A Distortion or Old Passages should show up near the top.
